name: Hunting Beris
Description:
Beris is tracking you down through the Labyrinth, burning to thrash you into a pleasure-addled mess.

{i}There’s a small note on the page mentioning that unlike the regular Labyrinth challenge, the hellhounds won't get stronger in the course of your exploration, since their lustful inner flames have time to abate from one encounter to the next.{/i}

theScene: Wordlessly, Beris rushes around a corner with a moodily pent-up glare on her face while blue flames erupt all around the two of you, preventing you from running away. It looks like she's determined to vent her frustrations on you, leaving you with no other option but to fuck her into submission first!
With the foulmouthed hellhound defeated, the flames flicker and vanish, leaving you free to proceed...
